message:
feat(onboard): add service definitions for authentication flow

Add structured data for the authentication guidance feature in the
onboard TUI. This prepares for the interactive auth flow (8h4 epic)
where users are guided through authenticating each installed service.

Service definitions include:
- AUTH_SERVICES: ordered array of service identifiers
  (tailscale, claude, codex, gemini, github, vercel, supabase, cloudflare)

- AUTH_SERVICE_NAMES: human-readable display names for each service
  (e.g., "Claude Code", "Gemini CLI", "Tailscale")

- AUTH_SERVICE_DESCRIPTIONS: brief descriptions explaining each service
  (e.g., "Secure VPS access via private network", "Anthropic's AI coding agent")

- AUTH_SERVICE_COMMANDS: the exact shell command to authenticate each service
  (e.g., "sudo tailscale up", "claude", "gh auth login", "vercel login")

This data structure enables:
1. Dynamic generation of the auth menu in onboard TUI
2. Consistent ordering of services (VPN first, then agents, then cloud)
3. Clear user-facing descriptions for each service
4. Accurate auth commands that users can copy/run

The auth flow will check if each service is installed before showing
its auth option, and will verify authentication status after the
user runs the command.

Related: 8h4 (Onboard TUI Auth Flow Integration)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -61,6 +61,51 @@ declare -a LESSON_FILES=(
     "08_keeping_updated.md"
 )
 
+# Service definitions for authentication flow
+declare -a AUTH_SERVICES=(
+    "tailscale"
+    "claude"
+    "codex"
+    "gemini"
+    "github"
+    "vercel"
+    "supabase"
+    "cloudflare"
+)
+
+declare -A AUTH_SERVICE_NAMES=(
+    ["tailscale"]="Tailscale"
+    ["claude"]="Claude Code"
+    ["codex"]="Codex CLI"
+    ["gemini"]="Gemini CLI"
+    ["github"]="GitHub"
+    ["vercel"]="Vercel"
+    ["supabase"]="Supabase"
+    ["cloudflare"]="Cloudflare"
+)
+
+declare -A AUTH_SERVICE_DESCRIPTIONS=(
+    ["tailscale"]="Secure VPS access via private network"
+    ["claude"]="Anthropic's AI coding agent"
+    ["codex"]="OpenAI's AI coding agent"
+    ["gemini"]="Google's AI coding agent"
+    ["github"]="Code hosting and version control"
+    ["vercel"]="Frontend deployment platform"
+    ["supabase"]="Database and auth backend"
+    ["cloudflare"]="CDN and edge computing"
+)
+
+declare -A AUTH_SERVICE_COMMANDS=(
+    ["tailscale"]="sudo tailscale up"
+    ["claude"]="claude"
+    ["codex"]="codex login"
+    ["gemini"]="gemini"
+    ["github"]="gh auth login"
+    ["vercel"]="vercel login"
+    ["supabase"]="supabase login"
+    ["cloudflare"]="wrangler login"
+)
+
 # Colors (works in most terminals) - fallback if gum_ui not loaded
 RED='\033[0;31m'
 GREEN='\033[0;32m'
